fault_hypothesis: Line 81 uses a simple `int()` (floor) conversion which truncates fractional parts and causes the sum of integer allocations to be less than `total`. The function should redistribute the remainder to ensure the sum equals `total`.

spec.expr: sum([int(v) for v in shares__1]) == int(total)

constraints.intent: After flooring all shares, their sum must equal the total; this is violated when fractional parts are discarded without redistribution.
Raw float shares must sum to total before any integer conversion is applied.
The integer-mode result list must sum exactly to the total capacity.
The shares list must have exactly one entry per weight before being used in the return expression.
